titles.title: I Am Who You Say I Am

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v4 v7 v5 v5 v8 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Who am I that the highest King would welcome me? I was lost, but He brought me in, Oh His love for me, Oh His love for me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Who the Son sets free, Oh, is free indeed, I'm a child of God, yes, I am.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Free at last, He has ransomed me, His grace runs deep, While I was a slave to sin, Jesus died for me, Yes, He died for me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Who the Son sets free, Oh, is free indeed, I'm a child of God, yes, I am, In my Father's house, There's a place for me, I'm a child of God, yes, I am.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I am chosen, not forsaken, I am who You say I am, You are for me, not against me, I am who You say I am.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I am chosen, not forsaken, I am who You say I am, You are for me, not against me, I am who You say I am, I am who You say I am.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: In my Father's house, There's a place for me, I'm a child of God, yes, I am.

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I am chosen, not forsaken, I am who You say I am, You are for me, not against me, I am who You say I am, Oh, I am who You say I am, Yes, I am who you say I am.
